backend/main.mo: Motoko actor that manages announcements and roster members using mutable Maps, exposing CRUD query/update methods for both entities. Announcements are returned sorted by timestamp descending.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report specifying a single change: update the visible label text of the fire-style CTA button in HeroSection.tsx from 'Join Now' to 'Join Now For Tournament' without altering animations or structure.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Auto-generated JSON document summarizing the purpose and recent changes of every frontend source file, serving as a quick reference for build planning.
frontend/index.css: Base Tailwind CSS file defining OKLCH CSS custom properties for light and dark color themes used throughout the app.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with PWA meta tags, manifest/icon links, the React root div, and a service worker registration script.
frontend/public/manifest.json: PWA web app manifest for Legend X Esports defining app name, icons, theme colors, display mode, and categories.
frontend/public/sw.js: Service worker implementing a cache-first strategy with background refresh for same-origin GET requests, skipping API calls and providing an offline fallback to index.html.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that composes PWAInstallBanner, Navbar, LandingPage, and AdminPanel into the full application layout.
frontend/src/components/AboutSection.tsx: About section component displaying team mission text, a clipped profile image panel, and a four-card values grid (Discipline, Excellence, Victory, Brotherhood).
frontend/src/components/AdminPanel.tsx: Floating admin widget with tabbed UI for creating, editing, and deleting roster members and announcements via React Query mutation hooks.
frontend/src/components/AnnouncementCard: Renders a styled card for a single announcement, displaying its title, body, and formatted nanosecond timestamp with hover effects and decorative accents.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Renders the site footer with the brand logo, a description, social media icon links, quick navigation links, and a copyright notice.
frontend/src/components/HeroSection.tsx: Full-screen hero section with a background image, overlays, the 'Legend X Esports' display title, tagline, and CTA buttons linking to the roster and about sections.
frontend/src/components/Navbar.tsx: Fixed top navigation bar with scroll-aware background, logo, desktop nav links, a 'Visit Website' CTA, and a collapsible mobile menu.
frontend/src/components/NewsSection.tsx: Displays a grid of AnnouncementCards fetched via the useAnnouncements hook, with loading skeletons, error, and empty states handled.
frontend/src/components/PlayerCard.tsx: Renders a player card with an avatar image, role badge, and player name, falling back to a default avatar on image load errors.
frontend/src/components/PWAInstallBanner: A fixed top banner that prompts users to install the app as a PWA, handling the beforeinstallprompt event for Android and providing manual instructions for iOS.
frontend/src/components/RosterSection.ts: Renders the roster/team section of the landing page, fetching player data via `useRoster` and displaying loading skeletons, error, empty, or a grid of `PlayerCard` components.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (anonymous or authenticated) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an `InternetIdentityProvider` and `useInternetIdentity` hook for managing Internet Identity authentication state (login, logout, identity persistence) via `@dfinity/auth-client`.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for fetching and mutating announcements and roster members against the ICP backend actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet importing Google Fonts and Tailwind layers, defining CSS custom properties for the dark esports theme, and utility classes for glows, typography, and clip-path effects.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with `QueryClientProvider` and `InternetIdentityProvider`.
frontend/src/pages/LandingPage.tsx: Composes the full landing page by rendering Hero, About, Roster, News, and Footer sections in order.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the theme with custom esports color tokens, fonts, shadows, keyframe animations, and enabling typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Tracks project state metadata including version, existing features, and a record of the CTA button text update feature request for the HeroSection.
